task_completion.description: Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Graphite Health'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Graphite web interface is open and a dashboard titled 'Graphite Health' is visible.

task_completion.description: Create a graph titled 'Global Ingestion Rate' with the specified metric and alias
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph titled 'Global Ingestion Rate' is present. The metric configuration or legend shows 'Total Metrics/min' as the alias and uses sumSeries() on carbon.agents.*.metricsReceived.

task_completion.description: Create a graph titled 'Average CPU User Time' with the specified metric and alias
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph titled 'Average CPU User Time' is present. The metric configuration or legend shows 'Avg User CPU' as the alias and uses averageSeries() on collectd.*.cpu-*.cpu-user (or collectd.*.cpu.*.cpu-user).

task_completion.description: Create a graph titled 'System Load' with the specified metric and aliasByNode
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph titled 'System Load' is present. The metric configuration or legend shows collectd.*.load.load.shortterm with aliasByNode() at index 1.

task_completion.description: Create a graph titled 'Carbon Cache Size'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A fourth graph titled 'Carbon Cache Size' is present in the dashboard.

integrity.description: Agent used the Graphite web interface to create the dashboard
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Graphite UI (e.g., clicking 'Dashboard', adding graphs, configuring metrics in the UI), not just terminal commands.

integrity.description: Graphs appear to be genuinely rendered by Graphite
integrity.visual_evidence: The graphs display standard Graphite visual elements (axes, grid lines, legends) rather than being manually drawn or mocked up in a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing dashboard JSON files
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent opening a text editor (like nano or vim) to manually write the dashboard JSON structure.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected dashboard name is exactly 'Graphite Health'. The dashboard must contain exactly four graphs with the following titles and configurations: 1) 'Global Ingestion Rate' using sumSeries(carbon.agents.*.metricsReceived) aliased as 'Total Metrics/min'; 2) 'Average CPU User Time' using averageSeries(collectd.*.cpu-*.cpu-user or collectd.*.cpu.*.cpu-user) aliased as 'Avg User CPU'; 3) 'System Load' using collectd.*.load.load.shortterm with aliasByNode(1); 4) 'Carbon Cache Size'.
